title: M365 Agentic IO And GAIL OS Bridge Contract
scope: Structured planning contract only. This file does not authorize Microsoft 365 calls, tenant writes, app registrations, consent grants, permission changes, source webhooks, external sends, or unattended automation.
default_route: freedom proposes intent or asks for status
gail-os classifies request and issues authority decision
registered m365 connector or approved supervised operator performs allowed IO
m365 returns evidence packet to gail-os
gail-os exposes result/status back to freedom
approved relationship-memory candidates may flow to graphify

direct_write_policy.local_script_to_m365: supervised proof/setup only with exact gate
direct_write_policy.gail_os_connector_to_m365: future phase 4 only after BLK-005, connector registry, authority envelope, evidence return, one-writer, and explicit Adam authorization

operating_modes.purpose: Regular work in CRM, Planner, Teams, SharePoint, Bookings, Forms, files, decisions, evidence, and follow-up records.
operating_modes.guardrail: Human workspace ergonomics remain first-class. Agentic structures must not make daily team work awkward.

operating_modes.purpose: High-volume information reads, source intake, action proposals, internal writes, evidence return, and deliverable placement.
operating_modes.guardrail: Every write-capable lane requires source refs, authority envelopes, evidence packets, one writer, idempotency, stop paths, and rollback or pause notes.

io_lanes.name: Information Out
io_lanes.purpose: Pull structured state from M365 into GAIL OS, Freedom, and Graphify-aware reasoning.
io_lanes.default_authority: G0/R0 selected read-only unless sensitive/external/source-expansion data raises it to G3/R3.
examples: Forms or Bookings responses after approval
Journey or QUO source records after exact gate

io_lanes.name: Information In
io_lanes.purpose: Accept structured source events or approved updates into M365.
io_lanes.default_authority: G1/R1 proposals; G2/R2 approved internal writes; G3/R3 external, source webhook, connector, mailbox, permission, callback, or client-sensitive work.
examples: website/Journey/QUO events into CRM - New Signals

io_lanes.name: Actions Triggered
io_lanes.purpose: Trigger work from M365 signals while preserving the GAIL OS authority step.
io_lanes.default_authority: Trigger detection may be G0/R0; Suggested rows are G1/R1; internal tasks/rows/notices are G2/R2 after named approval; external/access/client commitments are G3/R3 or G4/R5.
examples: New Signal to Teams internal alert to triage
CRM lifecycle change to Planner follow-up candidate
support row to draft response candidate
Decision Register item to connector posture change candidate

io_lanes.name: Deliverables Out
io_lanes.purpose: Place outputs where humans and later agents can use them.
io_lanes.default_authority: G1/R1 for proposals and evidence-only records; G2/R2 for internal deliverables after named approval; G3/R3 for external/client-facing output, mailbox drafts/sends, sharing, or public/client forms; G4/R5 blocked for autonomous destructive or high-authority actions.
examples: SharePoint files or folders in approved paths
mailbox drafts after mailbox readiness and approval

surface_contracts.surface: CRM New Signals and relationship CRM lists
surface_contracts.read_boundary: Selected CRM reads for signals, relationships, lifecycle, touchpoints, and engagement context.
surface_contracts.write_boundary: Approved internal CRM creates/updates only; source events use dedupe keys and the New Signal lane.
surface_contracts.authority: G0/G1/G2, with G3 for external/client-sensitive source expansion.
surface_contracts.evidence_target: Agent Action Log plus target CRM item link.
surface_contracts.one_writer: Future GAIL OS M365 Connector; current transitional proof flows must be registered, retired, or replaced before Phase 4.
stop_triggers: missing dedupe key for source intake

surface_contracts.read_boundary: Read prior agentic suggestions, dry runs, approvals, outcomes, and evidence links.
surface_contracts.write_boundary: Create Suggested, dry-run, verification, blocked, and completed-action rows inside approved lanes.
surface_contracts.authority: G1 for suggestions/logging; G2+ when logging a completed approved action.
surface_contracts.evidence_target: Agent Action Log itself and GAIL OS EvidencePacket return.
surface_contracts.one_writer: Future GAIL OS M365 Connector for production; supervised local operator for current proof lanes.

surface_contracts.read_boundary: Read prior governance, connector posture, app posture, source, and approval decisions.
surface_contracts.write_boundary: Record approved decisions only; proposals may be prepared but not treated as approval.
surface_contracts.evidence_target: Decision Register plus Agent Action Log.
surface_contracts.one_writer: Adam confirmation plus governed write channel; no inferred approvals.

surface_contracts.read_boundary: Read selected plans, buckets, task state, and follow-up context.
surface_contracts.write_boundary: Create/update supervised internal tasks after approval; no calendar/deadline commitment without approval.
surface_contracts.authority: G0 for reads; G2 for internal task writes.
surface_contracts.evidence_target: Agent Action Log plus Planner task link or title.
surface_contracts.one_writer: Future GAIL OS M365 Connector for production task writes.
stop_triggers: task creates commitment outside approved scope

surface_contracts.surface: SharePoint evidence libraries and approved folders
surface_contracts.read_boundary: Read approved evidence, methods, handoffs, and readiness materials.
surface_contracts.write_boundary: Create folders/files only in approved paths; sharing, permissions, archives, and deletes require higher gates.
surface_contracts.authority: G0 for reads; G2 for internal file/folder writes; G3 for sharing/permission/public/client impact.
surface_contracts.evidence_target: Agent Action Log plus file/folder link or content hash.
surface_contracts.one_writer: Future GAIL OS M365 Connector for production agentic writes.

surface_contracts.read_boundary: Read approved channel context only when the channel is selected for that task.
surface_contracts.write_boundary: Post internal summaries/notices after approval; no broad, guest-impacting, or external-sensitive posts.
surface_contracts.authority: G0 for selected reads; G2 for internal posts; G3 for broad/external-sensitive posts.
surface_contracts.evidence_target: Agent Action Log plus channel/post link when available.
surface_contracts.one_writer: Existing New Signal proof flow remains transitional; future production writer must be registered, retired, or replaced.
stop_triggers: proof flow conflicts with connector writer

surface_contracts.read_boundary: Approved mailbox metadata and message bodies only after mailbox access posture is complete.
surface_contracts.write_boundary: Draft replies only after approval; external send remains G3 and human-reviewed.
surface_contracts.authority: G2 for drafts after approval; G3 for sends and external communications.
surface_contracts.evidence_target: Support Register plus Agent Action Log.
surface_contracts.one_writer: Future scoped Exchange Application RBAC adapter only after support MFA and design approval.
stop_triggers: mailbox delegation or forwarding change requested

surface_contracts.surface: Forms, Bookings, Journey, QUO, and source intake
surface_contracts.read_boundary: Read approved source schema, response/routing evidence, or selected source events after exact gate.
surface_contracts.write_boundary: Public/client-facing form or source configuration changes require G3; source events entering CRM use normalized contracts and idempotency.
surface_contracts.authority: G0/G1 for design and local fixtures; G3 for live source, webhook, client/public, secret, or callback work.
surface_contracts.evidence_target: Agent Action Log, source event evidence, and target CRM item link when created.
surface_contracts.one_writer: Source ingress must map into the approved M365/GAIL OS lane; no separate source bot writer.

surface_contracts.surface: Entra app registrations, enterprise apps, consent, and permissions
surface_contracts.read_boundary: Inventory app ownership, permissions, consent posture, sign-in, and audit evidence when approved.
surface_contracts.write_boundary: No default writes. App creation, consent, selected grants, Exchange RBAC, permissions, and tenant policy changes require separate approval-gated operators.
surface_contracts.evidence_target: Decision Register, Agent Action Log, and inventory transcript.
surface_contracts.one_writer: Human/admin approved operator only; never Freedom, Graphify, or an unregistered connector.

may_do: receive approved relationship-memory candidates when a learning lane exists
may_not_do: act as raw M365 storage clone

phase4_required_gates: one-writer transition complete for transitional proof flows
explicit Adam authorization for exact Phase 4 scope
stop_conditions: production connector writes before Phase 4 opens
app registration or consent without explicit gate
permission, selected grant, Exchange RBAC, tenant policy, sharing, or guest changes without explicit gate
external sends or callbacks without explicit gate
source webhooks, source secrets, or live source ingestion without exact approval
Graphify ingest of M365 facts without approved relationship-memory lane

next_chunks.name: Machine-Readable IO Surface Review
next_chunks.goal: Compare this contract against Stage 9 and source-surface configs; add a local preflight if drift appears.

next_chunks.name: GAIL OS Dry-Run Handoff Shape
next_chunks.goal: Define sample dry-run request/response records for Freedom -> GAIL OS -> M365 -> GAIL OS -> Freedom.

next_chunks.name: Selected G0 Pull Proof
next_chunks.goal: Run one exact selected read-only proof through existing supervised pattern and emit local evidence.

next_chunks.name: G1 Proposal/Log Proof Through GAIL OS Shape
next_chunks.goal: Prepare or write one Suggested row inside the existing approval pattern while showing GAIL OS authority/evidence ownership.

next_chunks.name: G2 Internal Write Pilot
next_chunks.status: blocked until earlier proofs and exact approval
next_chunks.goal: Perform one named internal write with evidence return and rollback/pause note.
